parsed.explanation: I fixed structural XML issues while preserving the historical text as-is (including unusual glyphs). Fixes made: (1) escaped all unescaped ampersands in text content to & (3 occurrences in TITLE/text nodes), (2) corrected a mismatched closing tag at the end of the last BIBL entry from </PRICE> paired with <PRIZE> by normalizing to <PRICE>...</PRICE>, (3) removed an extra space before punctuation after </AUTHOR> to keep markup clean, (4) ensured all BIBL blocks remain properly nested and closed after tag correction, and (5) maintained consistent valid XML tokenization across the full ITEM string.
